info.title: A fatal error was encountered. The library 'libhostpolicy.so' required to execute the application was not found in '/usr/share/dotnet'.
info.description:
Failed to run as a self-contained app.
- The application was run as a self-contained app because '/tmp/inspectra-help-ssf.onion.sln-8.4.1-d2cf41c689874f80ba92b4d0bb8f7596/tool/.store/ssf.onion.sln/8.4.1/ssf.onion.sln/8.4.1/tools/net8.0/any/SSFTemplateOnionPackage.runtimeconfig.json' was not found.
- If this should be a framework-dependent app, add the '/tmp/inspectra-help-ssf.onion.sln-8.4.1-d2cf41c689874f80ba92b4d0bb8f7596/tool/.store/ssf.onion.sln/8.4.1/ssf.onion.sln/8.4.1/tools/net8.0/any/SSFTemplateOnionPackage.runtimeconfig.json' file and specify the appropriate framework.
